title: astragalus oreades
intro: Astragalus oreades, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus oreades include reducing stress and fatigue, boosting the immune system, and protecting against infections and diseases. Astragalus oreades can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
